---
title: 'Now Context JSON Example'
description: 'Example JSON response providing real-time astrological context for AI models. Optimized for Current Sky or Vibe Check interpretations.'
---

# Now Context Example

Endpoint: `/api/v5/now/context`

## Request Body
```json
{
  "name": "Current Atmosphere"
}
```

## Response Body
```json
{
  "status": "OK",
  "subject_context": "<chart name=\"Current Atmosphere\">\n  <birth_data date=\"2026-03-18 15:12\" city=\"Greenwich\" nation=\"GB\" lat=\"51.48\" lng=\"-0.00\" lng_dir=\"W\" tz=\"Etc/UTC\" />\n
```
